description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image and three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that caches the node_modules/ directory, runs npm install then npm run build. In the test stage add a deploy-test job that runs npm install, npm run build, and then node_modules/.bin/surge build qa-react-16-presentation.surge.sh, and is triggered manually. In the deploy stage add a deploy-prod job that runs npm install, npm run build, and then node_modules/.bin/surge build react-16-presentation.surge.sh, also manual. Ensure the cache is shared across jobs and no artifacts are defined.
